---
title: "Employee Shift Dashboard"
format: dashboard
---

```{r}
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)

df <- read.csv("data/employee_hours.csv")
```

## Row

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Employees"
list(
  icon = "people-fill",
  color = "primary",
  value = n_distinct(df$Employee)
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Total Hours Worked"
list(
  icon = "clock-fill",
  color = "success",
  value = sum(df$Hours_Worked)
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Avg Break (min)"
list(
  icon = "cup-hot-fill",
  color = "warning",
  value = round(mean(df$Break_Minutes), 1)
)
```

## Row

### Column

```{r}
#| title: "Hours Worked by Employee"
ggplot(df, aes(x = reorder(Employee, Hours_Worked), y = Hours_Worked, fill = Department)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Employee", y = "Hours Worked") +
  theme_minimal()
```

### Column

```{r}
#| title: "Hours by Department"
df |>
  group_by(Department) |>
  summarise(Total_Hours = sum(Hours_Worked)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Department, Total_Hours), y = Total_Hours, fill = Department)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(x = "Department", y = "Total Hours") +
  theme_minimal()
```

## Row

```{r}
#| title: "Shift Details"
df |>
  select(Employee, Department, Date, Start_Time, End_Time, Break_Minutes, Hours_Worked) |>
  DT::datatable()
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------
